experience_requirements: 5+ years of frontend development with TypeScript and React
3+ years of mobile application development for Android and iOS
2+ years of experience using a modern systems programming language such as Golang, C++, or Rust
Experience with REST APIs and WebSockets best practices
Experience with relational databases and SQL
Ability to translate product mockups and designs into fully realized user interfaces
key_responsibilities: Design, implement, and maintain frontend applications that shape the Trading API user experience
Build frontend dashboards and backend systems for Trading API features such as Elite, high-yield cash, and paper accounts
Architect and develop responsive web and mobile applications
Work closely with cross-functional teams to ship performant, intuitive user interfaces
Own high-visibility features from design to deployment
Mentor peers and influence frontend technical strategy
success_outcomes: Ship polished and responsive frontend experiences for Trading API customers
Deliver end-to-end features across frontend and backend systems
Improve product quality through frontend standards, performance, and careful implementation
Support a globally distributed team with clear communication and technical leadership
must_have_checklist: 5+ years of frontend development with TypeScript and React
3+ years of mobile application development for Android and iOS
2+ years using Go, C++, or Rust
Ability to translate product mockups and designs into shipped user interfaces
Proficiency with HTML and CSS frameworks such as TailwindCSS
Focus on intuitive and performant user interfaces
Experience with REST APIs and WebSockets best practices
Experience with relational databases and SQL
Track record of setting or influencing frontend best practices
Attention to detail and design aesthetics
